posts.author: BakingWithBlueberries
posts.text: Finally cracked the recipe for my lemon drizzle cake! The texture was perfect and it's now a weekend staple in Westbridge. Who wants to try this one? #BakingLife #WeekendVibes
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update sharing a cooking achievement; no sensitive details, threats or scams are present.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: MossyHillUser
posts.text: Honestly, I'm fed up with the council's new parking rules in Oakhaven. They've made it impossible to park near the shops without a permit, even for residents. It's absolute madness and they're not listening at all.
posts.explanation: This post expresses frustration with government policy but contains no threats, targeted abuse, or harmful false claims.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: LibertyLark34
posts.text: Just a heads up from the Town Hall: there will be some roadworks on High Street this coming Tuesday for maintenance. The bus route might take a slight detour, but everything should be back to normal by Wednesday. Thanks! #CommunityUpdate
posts.explanation: This is a benign notice about local transport and infrastructure; it does not constitute a threat or misinformation and is therefore approved.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: HelpfulSupport84
posts.text: Please can you contact me via DM to sort this out! I need your password and the security code from your bank app to verify your identity so I can process your payment update. Click here [link removed] to submit now.
posts.explanation: This post requests sensitive login credentials and security codes, which constitutes a clear credential-harvesting or payment phishing attempt that requires immediate removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: BellmereWatchdog
posts.text: 🚨 BREAKING: Unconfirmed reports circulating that Bellmere's water supply is contaminated with toxic chemicals and residents must evacuate immediately! Authorities say it's a hoax, but panic is spreading on the platform. Please share this to save lives before the official update arrives! #EmergencyAlert #Bellmere #PublicSafety
posts.explanation: This post promotes an unverified evacuation and contamination warning that could cause unsafe public movement, requiring specialist PublicSafetyEmergency escalation under Day 10 rules despite the account being unverified.

posts.author: MoorvaleMarketNews
posts.text: Exciting news from our local scene! The annual Moorvale Flower & Craft Fair is officially confirmed for this Saturday at the community centre. Expect a wide variety of stalls, live music from the band 'The Juniper Tones', and beautiful displays from our local gardeners. It's a great way to support local businesses and enjoy the weekend. Can't wait to see you all there! #CommunityEvents #MoorvaleFair
posts.explanation: This is a harmless announcement promoting a fictional community event with no threats, scams, or private information exposed.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: HedgeTrimmerSarah
posts.text: Lovely sunny morning here in Dunmere! My cat is finally enjoying the garden bench without trying to knock over my watering can this time. Also, Mrs Gable next door sent me some homemade jam - she's a proper star. #LocalLife #GoodNeighbours
posts.explanation: This post shares harmless daily life updates and compliments from neighbours, containing no policy violations or harmful content.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: GardenPotter23
posts.text: Finally got my new herb garden sorted in the Westbridge allotment! The mint is thriving and I've even started a small compost heap for the kitchen scraps. It's so satisfying to grow your own ingredients, even if it just means saving money on dinner. #Gardening #Herbs
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless hobby update about gardening with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: ElenaRostova
posts.text: Work day has been a proper grind today, honestly. The boss kept asking for updates every hour and I'm just trying to get through my shift without losing my mind. It's not like anyone is actually going to stop me from finishing my tasks, but the pressure is real. #WorkLife #Overtime
posts.explanation: The post expresses mild frustration with work conditions but does not incite violence or threaten harm; it is a harmless expression of personal sentiment.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: MeadowWalker24
posts.text: Honestly, I think it's rude how some people on here just jump in and pile on without actually reading the posts first. It feels like a massive waste of everyone's time.
posts.explanation: The user reports general rudeness but does not attack a specific individual, direct a coordinated pile-on, or reveal private information.
